name_en: Export Product Milk White! Small Size OHANEL🚩🚩🚩25B Affinity Duma Backpack The hottest one is definitely Duma, extremely high popularity🆙, finally returned to the classic 25B series🌟🌟. The classic quilted pattern is on the zipper puller and leather drawstring. The material is still calf leather. The black-gold color scheme is versatile and premium√. The leather is glossy and shiny👅👅, and it is wear-resistant. No need to worry too much when using~ The bag shape is compact and powerful! Casual and stylish when worn, practical and cute! Capacity is completely sufficient for commuting or travel. Size: 20X19 x12cm
